overview: Providence House is a substance use disorder treatment center in North Dakota serving adults seeking recovery from addiction. It offers multiple levels of care from 24-hour residential treatment to outpatient services, using 12-step principles and emphasizing whole-person healing.
highlights: 12-bed residential facility with 24-hour medical monitoring and nursing services
Multiple treatment levels: residential, social detox, day treatment, and outpatient programming
Court-ordered evaluations for alcohol and chemical dependency
targetAudience: Adults seeking treatment for substance use disorder and addiction recovery.
